_comment: Mirroring configuration — Fabric Cosmos DB into OneLake Lakehouse
_use_case: Operational NoSQL data (product catalog, customer profiles) from the Fabric Cosmos DB is automatically mirrored into the analytical Lakehouse. This enables SQL-based analytics, joins with transactional data, and ML feature engineering — all without impacting the operational workload.

authentication._comment: Fabric uses the workspace managed identity for Cosmos DB access — no secrets needed

tables.description: Rich product catalog with attributes, pricing, reviews, and inventory snapshots. Partitioned by /category/l1. ~50K documents.

columnMapping._comment: Cosmos DB documents are flattened to columnar format during mirroring. Nested objects become JSON columns in Delta.

tables.description: Customer 360 profiles: demographics, purchase history, loyalty, churn risk, recommendations. Partitioned by /loyalty_tier. ~2M documents.

mirroringDescriptor._note_order_events: Order events are NOT mirrored here — they are synced via the Spark notebook (sync_cosmos_to_lakehouse.py) for finer control over incremental processing and dedup.

destination.description: Cosmos DB operational data lands in bronze lakehouse with 'mirror_cosmos_' prefix. Product catalog and customer profiles are available for SQL analytics, joins, and ML features.
